title: owen233666's windows
description: Connectable windows with corner support here!
body:
## ✨ Features * Completely connectable windows, **including corners** * Fully vanilla wood type support * [**Plan**]A debug item to adjust corners, and other stuffs. * [**Plan**]Other mods compat, like Biomes O' Plenty, Regions Unexplored ## 🧱 Crafting Recipes PPP
PWP
PPP
P:Glass Pane
W:Any type of wood
In addition, windows of the same series can be converted into each other within the stone cutter (such as oak windows, stripped oak windows, and oak planks windows) ## 🛠️Compatibility * 1.20.1Fabric - Theoretically support any shaders * 1.21.1Neoforge - Due to issues with the Fabric Renderer API, there may be temporary rendering issues (with the vanilla and some shaders), while other shaders function normally. **This will fix in the future** ## 🗺️Roadmap * 1.0.0 First Release * 1.0.1 Add a debug item to adjust window state and corner type * 1.0.2 update to Minecraft 26.1
More Planning...

Additional Links:[Github README](https://github.com/owen233666/owenswindows)
